description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a landscaped plot featuring a large, flat-roofed main building with clean, geometric lines. The property includes a spacious driveway leading to the entrance, flanked by rows of palm trees and manicured lawns. To one side, there is a uniquely shaped swimming pool with a surrounding deck, and adjacent to it, a smaller outbuilding or pool house. On the opposite side of the main structure, a full-sized tennis court is integrated into the grounds, bordered by greenery. The bungalow's exterior is characterized by a combination of white and gray surfaces, large windows, and a sleek, minimalist aesthetic. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor spaces and recreational amenities, making it ideal for luxurious urban living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a pool, tennis court, and landscaped grounds, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, palm-lined driveway, and pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, entrance, and a glimpse of the tennis court on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tennis court, back of the bungalow, and the pool area on the right.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the pool complex, tennis court, and the relationship between the main building and outbuildings.
